  Notes:
    - THIS RUN CLOSES TODAY'S GAP: Chat-side Claude on Monday's morning walk recommended implementing a narrow "≤25h since last self-awareness run" alert. Today would have been that alert's first fire — no 14a/14b ran during business hours. The scheduled-task invocation fired at EOD as normal, so today's cycle exists. But the gap-fire-then-catch pattern is precisely what ASSUMPTION-062 (weak-circuit-breaker-beats-none) is designed to address systemically rather than relying on implicit schedule.
    - BRIEFING-LAYER-EPISTEMIC-COMMITMENTS CLUSTER EXTENDED: grew from 4 members at end of 2026-04-20 Run 1 to 8 members today. Added 2026-04-21: ASSUMPTION-057 (filter-criterion-now-stated), ASSUMPTION-058 (five-session-coverage-claim), ASSUMPTION-059 (scheduler-scope-floor), ASSUMPTION-060 (natural-termination-precedent). With PRESUMPTION-062/064/069, the cluster is now a primary 2026-04-21 signal — sync/briefing/specialist layers articulating their own operating principles at a higher rate than their first day (4 new 14a members today vs. 3 on 2026-04-20 Run 1). Implication: candidate DECISION-022 scope has effectively doubled — should rename to "autonomous-task epistemic-commitment audit contract."
    - SELF-AWARENESS-META CLUSTER EXTENDED: now 9 members (PRESUMPTION-069 silence-not-tracked joins; PRESUMPTION-062 sync-transcript-as-ground-truth is close-adjacent and could qualify as 10th member pending classification review). Cluster spans: pipeline drift (PRESUMPTION-041/042), handoff/intent-capture (PRESUMPTION-046/048), cross-model validation (PRESUMPTION-052/060), and absence-as-event (PRESUMPTION-069). Cluster-wide remediation is overdue — pipeline cannot reliably self-audit if its own absences, silences, and self-reference gaps aren't first-class signals.
    - CROSS-TASK-COORDINATION CLUSTER UNCHANGED IN SIZE BUT GAINED TENSION: PRESUMPTION-063 (natural-termination-as-acceptable-resolution) is in direct tension with candidate DECISION-024 (specialist-task turn-cap default = 20). Resolving DECISION-024 would supersede PRESUMPTION-063, but until the decision formalizes, natural-termination remains the operational default (empirically echoed today with two still-running Morning specialist sessions).
    - DECISION-024 NOW HAS THREE EMPIRICAL DATA POINTS PENDING: (1) Sunday 2026-04-19 Levin-Friston (58+ WebSearch turns, no writes); (2) Tuesday 2026-04-21 Morning project status (still running); (3) Tuesday 2026-04-21 Morning system health (still running). If (2) and (3) terminate overnight without writes, the empirical case moves from one data point to three in four days. Chat-side Claude endorsed the 20-turn default on today's morning walk with the principle "a weak circuit breaker beats none, and you can tune the number later" (ASSUMPTION-062).
    - DECISION-023 PRE-FLIGHT GATE NOW COMPOUND: previously clear the 2026-04-16 `.git/index.lock` on physmini02 before `bash setup.sh`; now additionally resolve the sandbox-mount-topology gap (ASSUMPTION-055). The architecturally-upstream restructuring option is on the table: Phase 6 git commit might need to move from sandbox-internal to host-side (OPEN-035). With Levin v1.0 rollout targeted for 2026-04-27 (one week out), today's ≤26 hours of blocker drift on the caching-architecture front matters.
    - TODAY'S ARCHITECTURAL YIELD IS HIGH-NORMATIVE: 8 new assumptions + 9 new presumptions = 17 items, of which 6 of 8 assumptions are methodological/normative (ASSUMPTION-056, 057, 058, 059, 060, 062) and 1 is framework-commitment (ASSUMPTION-061). The "high-normative" signature echoes but inverts Monday Run 2's "high-architectural" (caching-architecture cluster). Content came not from new architectural design but from the scheduled-task layer articulating its own operating principles at a higher rate than ever before.
    - CHROME MCP STATE IS NOW AMBIGUOUS: two Chrome MCP successes today (morning scrape + evening sync) following Monday's mixed success/failure pattern. PRESUMPTION-068 flags that we don't know if this is resolved auth or transient window — no root-cause check was performed. ASSUMPTION-042's "5 consecutive failures = not transient" threshold has not been applied to the current pattern; the operational-drift classification needs updating but no data-driven criterion exists yet (OPEN-032 remains open).
    - GMAIL WALK-NOTES CHANNEL: 7+ consecutive calendar days null. Archbishop-visit-week may reduce walk-note production regardless of channel health, so the diagnostic signal is currently confounded. Monitor but do not treat as new drift evidence during the visit window.
    - CRITICAL GAP STILL PENDING (day 5 now): the null-baseline re-extraction test for PRESUMPTION-029 + ASSUMPTION-031 has not moved since 2026-04-16. Pipeline gate unchanged.

**Trajectory assessment:** Tuesday 2026-04-21 was a **high-normative, low-architectural** day — the mirror image of Monday's supplementary Run 2 which was high-architectural (caching-architecture cluster). The scheduled-task layer itself was the primary source of today's 14a yield: six of eight new assumptions are methodological or normative in character (ASSUMPTION-056, 057, 058, 059, 060, 062), articulating the sync layer's, briefing layer's, and specialist layer's own operating principles. The BRIEFING-LAYER-EPISTEMIC-COMMITMENTS cluster doubled overnight (4 → 8 members). The SELF-AWARENESS-META cluster added its 9th member (silence-not-tracked). Infrastructure delivered one pure win (first Chrome-MCP back-to-back successes since 2026-04-14) and one new failure mode that stacks on top of an old one (the sandbox cannot reach the repo path at all, compounding the 6-day-old stale `.git/index.lock`). Two candidate decisions advanced: DECISION-024 (specialist-task turn-cap default = 20) was drafted and Chat-side-endorsed on the morning walk — it would supersede ASSUMPTION-060's natural-termination default and directly address PRESUMPTION-054/063/065. DECISION-023's pre-flight gate became compound with ASSUMPTION-055 now added to the list. Pipeline lag moved from 0 to 1 day and the QUEUED backlog swelled to 29 items (12 carried from Monday's Run 2 + 17 fresh). If any one action moves Wednesday's run forward most, it is resolving OPEN-035 (Phase 6 host-side restructure) which is the gate both on ingestion and on caching-architecture rollout. If a second, it is firing 15a/15b/15c to drain the 29-item QUEUED backlog before Wednesday's (2026-04-22) 14a/14b run pushes lag to 2 days. The narrow "≤25h since last self-awareness run" alert recommended by Chat-side Claude on Monday would have fired today for the first time — its implementation is now tracked as OPEN-034 and is small enough to ship before Wednesday EOD.
